data.command: FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""); CONTENT=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.content // ""); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && echo "$CONTENT" | grep -q 'console\.log'; then echo 'Warning: console.log statements should be removed before committing' >&2; exit 2; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" == "package.json" ]]; then echo 'Checking for vulnerable dependencies...'; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; fi
FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]]; then npx prettier --write "$FILE"; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx)$ ]]; then RESULT=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "TypeScript errors found: $RESULT" >&2; exit 2; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ ]] && grep -q 'import \* from' "$FILE"; then echo 'Warning: Avoid wildcard imports for better tree-shaking' >&2; exit 2; fi

FILE=$(echo $STDIN_JSON | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$ && "$FILE" != *".test."* && "$FILE" != *".spec."* ]]; then DIR=$(dirname "$FILE"); BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE" | sed -E 's/\.(js|jsx|ts|tsx)$//'); for TEST_FILE in "$DIR/$BASENAME.test."* "$DIR/$BASENAME.spec."*; do if [ -f "$TEST_FILE" ]; then echo "Running tests for $TEST_FILE..."; if command -v jest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx jest "$TEST_FILE" --passWithNoTests; elif command -v vitest >/dev/null 2>&1; then npx vitest run "$TEST_FILE"; fi; break; fi; done; fi
callback

content.text:
All 8 files have been written successfully. Here is a summary of what was created:

**Root routing:**
1. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\_layout.tsx` -- Root layout wrapping the app with `GestureHandlerRootView`, `SafeAreaProvider`, `AuthProvider`, `PushProvider`, and a `Stack` navigator with screens for index, auth group, tabs group, and the offer modal.

2. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\index.tsx` -- Entry point that checks auth state and onboarding status via AsyncStorage, then redirects to `/(tabs)`, `/(auth)/login`, or `/(auth)/onboarding` accordingly. Hides the splash screen before navigating.

**Auth group (`(auth)`):**
3. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(auth)\_layout.tsx` -- Simple Stack layout with `slide_from_right` animation and no header.

4. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(auth)\onboarding.tsx` -- 3-slide horizontal FlatList onboarding with dot indicators and skip/next/start buttons. Persists completion to AsyncStorage.

5. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(auth)\login.tsx` -- Login screen with email/password inputs, sign-in via `useAuth().signIn`, forgot-password link, and signup footer link.

6. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(auth)\signup.tsx` -- Customer signup screen with full name, email, and password fields. Uses `useAuth().signUp` and shows a confirmation alert on success.

7. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(auth)\forgot-password.tsx` -- Password reset screen using `supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail`. Shows a confirmation view after the email is sent.

**Tabs group (`(tabs)`):**
8. `C:\Users\User\AstroLabDiffusion\astrolab\apps\mobile\app\(tabs)\_layout.tsx` -- Tab bar with 5 tabs (Accueil, Cartes, Scanner, Offres, Profil). The Scanner tab uses the custom `ScanTabButton` component. Emoji-based tab icons with themed styling and platform-aware tab bar height.
